author: JohnnieLZ
title: Engineering Quality Report: do_run_batches God Function + Linting Findings
notes: Core claim (355-line do_run_batches) is factually correct but is a duplicate of at least 4 earlier submissions (S023, S028, S030, S076) that all identify the same function with more detail. Secondary findings (15 functions over 100 lines, 179 missing docstrings, 9 empty __init__.py, incomplete type annotations) are inaccurate or superficial linting observations. Actual count of 100+ line functions is 40, not 15. No specific line references, no impact analysis, no novel insight.
